title: Latest podman RPM broken on Fedora 28
body:
Just runnning a `sudo dnf update --refresh` threw this:


comments.body: @frezbo sorry about this issue, I'm pushing new builds to handle the upgrade path.
a quick workaround would be to manually remove the containernetworking-cni package and install containernetworking-plugins

@frezbo I updated the podman and containernetworking-plugins builds in https://bodhi.fedoraproject.org/updates/containernetworking-plugins-0.7.3-2.fc28%20podman-0.8.4-2.git9f9b8cf.fc28 PTAL when you get the chance. Should land in updates-testing in hopefully less than 24 hours.
Oops, I actually removed and re-installed as I needed to get  the other system updates. Bu thanks.
no worries, as long as you're not blocked on this, it's cool with me :)
@rhatdan happy to close, thought I haven't verified. Re-open if someone faces the same issue.
